headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Equal-Weight on Becton Dickinson, Raises Price Target to $161
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Lawrence Biegelsen   maintains Becton Dickinson (NYSE:BDX) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $157 to $161.
